lines.speaker: Commander Fullore
lines.text: Hey. I have something for you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hey Lydia. How are things here?

lines.speaker: Commander Fullore
lines.text: It's still early days for King Artur. He was raised to rule, but he lacks the experience his father had. Still, he can't be any worse than the Council.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Any news on Xamphur or the killer?

lines.speaker: Commander Fullore
lines.text: Nothing yet. For all we know, they could be one and the same. Lord Arceuus is doing everything he can to learn more about Xamphur, and the Lovakengj smiths are inspecting the murder weapon.

lines.speaker: Commander Fullore
lines.text: I'll let you know once we have something on either of them.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thank you. I'll let you get on with your work.

lines.speaker: Commander Fullore
lines.text: Good luck out there. Don't be a stranger.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello.

lines.speaker: Commander Fullore
lines.text: Good day.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Who are you?

lines.speaker: Commander Fullore
lines.text: I'm Commander Lydia Fullore, leader of the Kourend Royal Guard.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What do you do here?

lines.speaker: Commander Fullore
lines.text: The Kourend Royal Guard protect and serve the ruler of Kourend. As their leader, I am responsible for ensuring that the Royal Guard are well trained and well supplied.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Are the Royal Guard part of the Shayzien Army?

lines.speaker: Commander Fullore
lines.text: No. Unlike the Shayzien Army, the Royal Guard serve the ruler of the kingdom directly.

lines.speaker: Commander Fullore
lines.text: The Royal Guard was established by King Byrne I. He felt that it was dangerous for Shayzien House to control the only military in the kingdom, so he decided to establish a small one of his own.

lines.speaker: Commander Fullore
lines.text: Ever since then, the Royal Guard have served Kourend's ruler.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Who's the current ruler of Kourend?

lines.speaker: Commander Fullore
lines.text: The current ruler, or rulers as I should say, are the Kourend Council. They've ruled the kingdom for the past twenty years, ever since the last King died.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Goodbye.
